## Risk

- [ ] **Low** — Config, docs, typo fixes, non-functional changes
- [ ] **Medium** — Feature additions, refactors, dependencies
- [ ] **High** — Auth, security, data handling, breaking changes

## Gate label

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets in logs, comments, or committed files
- [ ] No new elevated permissions without justification
- [ ] GPT/API keys only in GitHub Secrets or local env — never in repo
